scenario: Multi-truck project — 5 flatbeds across 2 lanes, complex requirements
subject: Project Quote - Multi-Truck Flatbed Moves
body:
Jillian,

We have a project coming up and need pricing on the following moves:

Lane 1: Houston, TX to Memphis, TN
- 3 flatbeds
- Commodity: Construction equipment (excavator parts)
- Approx weight per truck: 44,000 lbs
- Pickup window: April 20-22, 2026
- Delivery by: April 25, 2026
- Tarping required on all loads

Lane 2: Houston, TX to Nashville, TN
- 2 flatbeds
- Commodity: Steel beams
- Approx weight per truck: 46,000 lbs
- Pickup window: April 21-23, 2026
- Delivery by: April 26, 2026
- Oversize permits may be needed — beams are 53ft

We'd like per-truck pricing for each lane and an all-in project rate if possible.

Let me know if you need anything else.

Sarah Chen
Global Freight Solutions
(713) 555-0298

expected_extraction.special_requirements: Tarping required, Oversize permits may be needed (53ft beams)

notes: Multi-lane email. Destination confidence lower because two different destinations. Agent may need to create two RFQs or flag for review.
